message:
docs: update stale comments about deferred cache rebuild behavior

Read operations no longer call ensure_blocked_cache_fresh — they
compute blocked state in-memory when the cache is stale (#216).
Update four doc comments that still referenced the old lazy-rebuild
behavior to accurately describe the current flow: stale cache
persists until the next non-deferred write rebuilds it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
